data.title: Cart.com raises $180 million to expand logistics network and AI
data.description: Planned investments include workflow automation tools, predictive analytics and artificial intelligence systems designed to help route inventory, reduce shipping times and lower fulfillment costs.

data.title: Middle East war disrupts U.S. B2B ecommerce supply chains
data.description: If disruptions persist, analysts expect B2B sellers to increase safety stock, diversify suppliers and reassess sourcing strategies to protect ecommerce fulfillment operations.

data.title: Ingram Micro expands AI automation and digital technology
data.description: The company said it designed its Xvantage system to connect vendors, partners and customers across Ingram Micro's global distribution network.

data.title: STIHL launches B2B marketplace using Mirakl
data.description: The platform enables customers to shop for STIHL products online while orders are fulfilled by the company’s network of more than 10,000 authorized dealers across the U.S.

data.title: Target details approach toward agentic commerce in early 2026
data.description: CEO Michael Fiddelke said the retailer is "at the forefront of innovation" regarding agentic AI and its commerce applications.
